name: Ereshkigal
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Ereshkigal queen below — gravity of truth where masks cannot breathe.
flowText: Ereshkigal queen below — gravity of truth where masks cannot breathe.

related.name: ♏ Scorpio
related.teaser: Scorpio is the underworld’s gate — serpent of shadow, phoenix flame, keeper of mysteries.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: XIII. Death
related.teaser: Death is not an end but a passage — dissolution of form into the dark womb of renewal.

related.name: Jet
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Cassiel
related.teaser: Cassiel is a bedrock of becoming — Hourglass; under Saturn; in Capricorn.

related.name: Azrael
related.teaser: Azrael is a quiet axis — Threshold veils; in Scorpio; with XIII Death.

related.name: Anubis
related.teaser: Anubis is a quiet axis — Jackal; under Mercury; in Scorpio; with XIII Death.

related.name: Three of Pentacles
related.teaser: Three of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.

related.name: Page of Pentacles
related.teaser: Page of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: Fire Agate
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.
